title: Enforce working_root in CodingBackend base class
description:
CodingBackend.__init__ accepts working_root: Path and stores it as workdir
Add _check_workdir_safe guard plus SecurityError definition
Call guard in execute() before subprocess invocations
Verification: `python -m pytest tests/test_sandbox.py -x`
acceptance_criteria: workdir outside working_root raises SecurityError before execution
workdir equal to working_root is allowed
SecurityError message includes both workdir and working_root paths
